# 2026-05-17 — Quarry Overlook, rain

Rained the whole walk. Short one. Went up to the
[Quarry Overlook](../trails/quarry-overlook.md) and straight back.

Nothing much moving in the wet. A single
[Eastern Bluebird](../species/birds/eastern-bluebird.md) sheltering under the
overlook rail — same fencelines as [May 2](2026-05-02.md), most likely.
